enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who composed the music for the song Aga Naga Naga?

The music was composed by the talented Harrish Jeyaraj.

Which movie features the song Aga Naga Naga?

The song is featured in the Tamil movie Ko.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Ko?

The lead roles are played by Jiiva and Karthika Nair.

What is the mood of the song Aga Naga Naga?

The song has an energetic and motivational vibe, perfect for celebrations and parties.

When was the movie Ko released?

The movie was released in the year 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aga Naga Naga from the 2011 Tamil movie Ko, starring Jiiva and Karthika Nair, is a high-energy dance number. Composed by Harrish Jeyaraj with lyrics by Pa Vijay, the song features a vibrant mix of vocals by multiple talented singers. It captures the spirit of celebration and motivation, making it a favorite for parties and energetic gatherings. The movie itself is a political thriller, and this song adds a lively and engaging moment to its narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aga Naga Naga from the movie Ko is a vibrant and energetic track that captures the essence of celebration and enthusiasm. Composed by Harrish Jeyaraj and penned by Pa Vijay, this song features dynamic vocals by a talented ensemble of singers. Its lively beats and motivational lyrics make it a standout number in Tamil cinema.

Hey, boys and girls, you all look great tonight! Let's party and turn up the heat. As we elevate this, we will make the song exciting. And yes, greetings and welcome to everyone!
In the sky and on the ground, I blend with the stars, thinking and dreaming. Crazy thoughts come to mind, Yeah, Yeah.

Lamborghini, Love-o-many, silver star. All night, this is the work. You are the wife, the fire, who else is there for you?
When friends gather, he thinks of his friend. In this place, there is no escape from this situation.
The heart beats strongly, looking closely, it feels good a little.

Little by little, Rolex watches, talking about virtues. Let the sparkle shine, slowly with Swiss keys. Life is about brands, friendship is about connection. Who holds whose hand, ahhh, good vibes. The heart changes fashion, passion is everywhere, love is in the air.

Yo Yo, good shoes, switch your style. No locals, only branded. If you have the spirit, come dance. Can't hold back, the heart beats strongly. Yeah, it's not about fashion, but passion given by God. Let me confess, love has no brands right now... feel good, feel good... Many people around, who says beautiful things, oh heart, oh heart, don't forget this feeling.
Little by little, the moon shines, the breeze brings gifts. With a little charm, some sweetness is shared. This is the truth, this is the reality. Success is here to help us.
